tree.name: Noa Essengue
tree.note: French forward, drafted 12th overall in 2025 NBA Draft with CHI's own pick reacquired from SAS

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#12) via CHI (reacquired)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: Bulls traded Zach LaVine and a 2028 2nd round pick to Kings; Kings traded Kevin Huerter to Bulls; Kings traded De'Aaron Fox and Jordan McLaughlin to Spurs; Spurs traded Zach Collins, Tre Jones and a 2025 1st round pick (CHI own, originally sent to SAS in DeRozan S&T) to Bulls.
assetsGivenUp.note: CHI's own 2025 1st, originally sent to SAS in Aug 2021 DeRozan sign-and-trade, reacquired in Feb 2025 LaVine mega-deal

assetsGivenUp.name: Zach LaVine
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Bulls traded Jimmy Butler and Justin Patton to Timberwolves for Zach LaVine, Kris Dunn, and Lauri Markkanen

assetsGivenUp.name: Jimmy Butler
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 30th overall by Chicago Bulls from Marquette in 2011 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 2nd Round Pick via CHI
assetsGivenUp.note: Chicago's own 2028 2nd round pick, sent to SAC in LaVine mega-deal
